title: EMILIA action-risk manifest
description: Declares which machine actions require pre-execution human-authorization receipts, at which assurance tier (EP-ACTION-RISK-MANIFEST-v0.1). Consumed by EMILIA Gate and @emilia-protocol/require-receipt; mirrors validateActionRiskManifest.

actions.description: Action entries. Entry ids must be unique (enforced by the runtime validator).

label.description: Human-readable label shown in logs and reports.

action_type.description: Canonical action type the receipt must be bound to, e.g. "payment.release". Required when receipt_required is true.

risk.description: Risk class. Must be medium, high, or critical when receipt_required is true.

receipt_required.description: When true, the gate refuses this action without a valid, in-scope, unconsumed authorization receipt.

assurance_class.description: Minimum assurance tier credited only from cryptographic proof: software; class_a (WebAuthn device signoff); quorum (M-of-N distinct humans).

match.description: Selector matching incoming actions. Protocol fields such as {"protocol": "mcp", "tool": "release_payment"} or {"method": "POST", "path": "/v1/payments"}.

method.description: HTTP method, used together with path.

path.description: HTTP path, used together with method.

execution_binding.description: Fields of the executed action that must byte-match the fields the human authorized.

required_fields.description: Field names bound between authorization and execution, e.g. ["action_type", "amount_usd", "beneficiary_account_hash"].
